slides.title: Kissflow Academy
slides.subtitle: Structured learning paths for platform mastery

slides.title: Academy Platform Overview
bullets: Comprehensive learning platform at academy.kissflow.com
Self-paced courses with hands-on exercises
Learning paths from beginner to expert certification
Covers Apps, Workflow Automation, and Integrations
Free access for Kissflow account holders
Progress tracking and course completion certificates
slides.notes: Encourage all trainees to enroll before leaving today.

slides.title: Expert Learning Paths

items.label: Kissflow Expert
items.desc: Complete path to full platform mastery

items.label: Integrations Expert
items.desc: Advanced citizen and IT developer features

slides.notes: Three progressive paths — recommend starting with Workflow Expert.

slides.title: Apps Course
bullets: Build no-code and low-code applications end to end
Covers page design, navigation, components, and publishing
Dataform creation and view configuration exercises
Embed processes, boards, and reports in apps
Custom scripting introduction for page components
Capstone project: build a complete departmental app

slides.title: Workflow Automation Course
bullets: Learn to design forms, workflows, and automate approvals
Step-by-step process builder exercises
Conditional routing and parallel branch labs
Notification and SLA configuration practice
Process report creation and scheduling
Best starting point for new Kissflow users

slides.title: Integrations Course
bullets: Exchange information within and beyond your Kissflow account
Pre-built connector configuration exercises
REST API authentication and first API call lab
Webhook setup and payload handling
Integration in workflow steps — hands-on lab
Designed for citizen and IT developers

slides.title: Community Resources
bullets: community.kissflow.com — 565+ documentation articles
Product Updates: announcements, roadmap, tips and tricks
Pre-release notes for upcoming features
Follow categories for email notifications on new content
Ask questions and share best practices with peers
Kissflow Pulse Podcast for industry insights and interviews
slides.notes: Community complements Academy for ongoing learning.

slides.title: Recommended Learning Sequence
bullets: Week 1-2: Workflow Automation course + submit first process item
Week 3-4: Apps course + build first app with dataform views
Week 5-6: Integrations course + configure first connector
Ongoing: Community documentation for specific feature deep-dives
Month 2+: Pursue Kissflow Expert learning path for certification
Attend Kissflow events and webinars for advanced topics
slides.notes: Give trainees a concrete post-training learning plan.

slides.title: Training Complete — Next Steps
bullets: Enroll in Kissflow Academy — start Workflow Automation course today
Build your first process or app in a sandbox environment
Join the Community and introduce yourself to fellow users
Bookmark community.kissflow.com for documentation reference
Explore Developer Hub if your role involves API/SDK work
Schedule follow-up training for advanced topics (Dataforms, Portals, Governance)
slides.notes: Thank trainees and open Q&A session.
